title: eriogonum umbellatum var. umbelliferum
intro: Eriogonum umbellatum var. umbelliferum, also known as the sulfur buckwheat or eschscholzia buckwheat, is a perennial herb in the buckwheat family, characterized by its clusters of small, pinkish-yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Eriogonum umbellatum var. umbelliferum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically to treat skin conditions and internally to support overall health.
